# Scoped ignore list for the security-container-backup CI job's postgres
# scan ONLY (passed explicitly via trivy-action's `trivyignores` input on
# that one step) -- NOT a repo-root .trivyignore, so it can't accidentally
# suppress a real finding in the app's own backend/frontend image scans.
#
# All 15 CVEs below are in usr/local/bin/gosu, a small static Go binary
# baked into the official postgres Docker image (docker-library/postgres)
# solely to drop root privileges before exec'ing postgres at container
# startup -- it runs once per container start, never accepts network input,
# and exits immediately after exec. The CVEs are all in Go's crypto/tls,
# net/url, net/mail, crypto/x509, net/http2, and os (os.Root) stdlib
# packages, none of which gosu's own code path exercises (it does not open
# a TLS connection, parse a URL, handle HTTP, or use the os.Root sandboxed-
# filesystem API). They are unreachable in this deployment context.
#
# Every current postgres:17.x tag (17, 17.5, 17.6, 17-bookworm as of
# 2026-07-11) resolves to a different image digest but the same gosu build
# (Go 1.24.6) -- there is no available upstream fix to pin to yet. Re-check
# when docker-library/postgres publishes a rebuild with an updated gosu.
CVE-2025-68121
CVE-2025-61726
CVE-2025-61729
CVE-2026-25679
CVE-2026-27145
CVE-2026-32280
CVE-2026-32281
CVE-2026-32283
CVE-2026-33811
CVE-2026-33814
CVE-2026-39820
CVE-2026-39822
CVE-2026-39836
CVE-2026-42499
CVE-2026-42504
